mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PRODUCT_COMMENT ( PRD_SN, USR_SN, PRD_CMT_TYPE_CD, PRD_CMT_TTL, PRD_CMT_CN, PRD_CMT_REG_ID, PRD_CMT_UPDT_ID ) VALUES ( #{prdSn}, #{usrSn}, #{prdCmtTypeCd}, #{prdCmtTtl}, #{prdCmtCn}, #{prdCmtRegId}, #{prdCmtUpdtId} )
mapper.select: SELECT PRD_CMT_SN AS prdCmtSn, PRD_CMT_TTL AS prdCmtTtl, PRD_CMT_CN AS prdCmtCn, PRD_CMT_REG_DT AS prdCmtRegDt, PRD_CMT_UPDT_DT AS prdCmtUpdtDt FROM PRODUCT_COMMENT WHERE PRD_SN = #{prdSn} AND PRD_CMT_TYPE_CD = 'PRDC0005' ORDER BY PRD_CMT_SN DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PRODUCT_COMMENT ( PRD_SN, USR_SN, PRD_CMT_TYPE_CD, PRD_CMT_CN, PRD_CMT_REG_ID, PRD_CMT_UPDT_ID ) VALUES ( #{prdSn}, #{usrSn}, 'PRDC0006', #{prdCmtCn}, #{prdCmtRegId}, #{prdCmtUpdtId} )

INSERT INTO PRODUCT_COMMENT ( PRD_SN, USR_SN, PRD_CMT_TYPE_CD, PRD_CMT_PARENT_SN, PRD_CMT_CN, PRD_CMT_REG_ID, PRD_CMT_UPDT_ID ) VALUES ( #{prdSn}, #{usrSn}, 'PRDC0007', #{prdCmtParentSn}, #{prdCmtCn}, #{prdCmtRegId}, #{prdCmtUpdtId} )
mapper.select: SELECT c.PRD_CMT_SN AS prdCmtSn, c.USR_SN AS usrSn, u.USR_NM AS usrNm, c.PRD_CMT_TYPE_CD AS prdCmtTypeCd, c.PRD_CMT_PARENT_SN AS prdCmtParentSn, c.PRD_CMT_CN AS prdCmtCn, c.PRD_CMT_REG_DT AS prdCmtRegDt FROM PRODUCT_COMMENT c JOIN USERS u ON u.USR_SN = c.USR_SN WHERE c.PRD_SN = #{prdSn} AND c.PRD_CMT_TYPE_CD IN ('PRDC0006', 'PRDC0007') ORDER BY COALESCE(c.PRD_CMT_PARENT_SN, c.PRD_CMT_SN), c.PRD_CMT_TYPE_CD

SELECT PRD_CMT_SN AS prdCmtSn, PRD_SN AS prdSn, USR_SN AS usrSn, PRD_CMT_TYPE_CD AS prdCmtTypeCd, PRD_CMT_PARENT_SN AS prdCmtParentSn, PRD_CMT_CN AS prdCmtCn FROM PRODUCT_COMMENT WHERE PRD_CMT_SN = #{inquirySn} AND PRD_CMT_TYPE_CD = 'PRDC0006'
